oauthCallback.cancelledDetail: You can try again or choose a different sign-in method.
oauthCallback.emailConflictDetail: This email is already linked to another sign-in method. Try signing in with your original method.
oauthCallback.noEmailDetail: This provider couldn't share your email. Please try a different sign-in method.
oauthCallback.connectionErrorDetail: Something went wrong connecting to the provider. Please try again.

errors.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.usernamePattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordPattern: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter and one number
errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email before signing in
errors.INVALID_VERIFICATION_CODE: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
errors.VERIFICATION_CODE_EXPIRED: Code expired. Request a new one.
errors.VERIFICATION_BLOCKED: Too many attempts. Try again in {{minutes}} minutes.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
errors.MAX_RESENDS_EXCEEDED: Maximum resends reached for this hour.
errors.SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED: This account can only sign in with its linked social provider.
errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Could not connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: The request took too long. Please try again.
errors.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check the information you entered.
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.OAUTH_EMAIL_CONFLICT: This email is already linked to another sign-in method
errors.OAUTH_NO_EMAIL: We couldn't retrieve your email from this provider
errors.tryAgainIn: Too many failed attempts. Try again in {{time}}.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.useAlternativeLogin: You can still sign in with Google or Microsoft.
